title: Zaranj Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zaranj with a Z-Score of +4.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zaranj is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 13%, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.5 km/h. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
